microtargets.title: What is living
ncertAnchors: NCERT Biology Class 11, Chapter: Diversity in Living World, Section detailing What is living
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of What is living is heavily tested in recent NEET papers.

diagrams.name: Visual representation of what is living

commonTraps: Misinterpreting the subtle edge cases of What is living during high-pressure exam scenarios.

Successfully avoids common pitfalls when What is living is integrated with other concepts in Diversity in Living World.
